description_long: This is a single, high-ankle boot with a deep green exterior and a robust, utilitarian design. The upper section features a wide, folded collar with a prominent strap and buckle detail, giving it a rugged, military-inspired appearance. The boot is equipped with black laces threaded through multiple eyelets, providing a secure fit and additional visual texture. The sole is thick and black, with visible stitching along the edge, suggesting durability and comfort for urban walking. The surface of the boot appears matte with subtle creases, indicating a flexible yet sturdy material, likely synthetic leather or treated fabric. No visible logos or brand markings are present, and the boot appears to be in pristine, unworn condition.
description: A rugged, high-ankle green boot with a wide collar, strap and buckle detail, black laces, and a thick, stitched sole. The surface is matte and the boot appears new and unworn.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, black laces, and the wide folded collar with strap detail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the boot's profile, thick sole, and the layered construction of the upper and collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back seam, heel structure, and the continuation of the collar and strap.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the buckle on the strap and the detailed stitching along the sole and upper.
